articles.author: Swati Pandey, Paul-Alain Hunt
articles.title: More Iranian Women Soccer Players Reverse Australia Asylum Claim - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: One more member of the Iranian women’s soccer team granted asylum by Australia has decided to return to Iran, bringing the total to five of the original seven given refuge, according to a senior government official.
